name: pcs-tape
description: Anti-corrosion Petrolatum Coated Tapes can be used for a wide range of industries, including oil and gas, waterworks and marine. Our products are designed to stop and prevent corrosion on pipe, valves, fittings and flanges in the harshest environments imaginable. As leaders in corrosion prevention and sealing systems, we provide the utility a means to extend the life of their pipe assets through cathodic protection and petrolatum overwrap products. A preparatory priming paste used to displace surface moisture, passivate surface oxides and fill small irregularities in surfaces that will be wrapped with PT Petrolatum Tape. A non-woven stitch bonded synthetic fabric, fully impregnated and coated with Petrolatum based compounds and fillers. Petrolatum Tape is chemically resistant and does not polymerize or oxidize.

name: bren-anodes
description: Galaxy Plastics Ltd is pleased to offer sacrificial anodes in both Zinc and Magnesium for Cathodic Protection programs. A sacrificial anode is a metallic anode used in cathodic protection where it is intended to be dissolved to protect other metallic components. Magnesium anodes shall be supplied with a blue lead wire. BREN – 3/4″ NPT Threaded. 99.9% Pure Special High Grade Zinc.
